what_the_owner_is_assumed_to_know: Nothing about the current hadith, explanation chain, or earlier passage
why_that_assumption_is_forbidden_or_allo: This is the only safe default; assuming more is forbidden
risk_if_wrong: The system silently relies on memory and prior reading instead of explicit support.

assumption_label: Owner already knows this is hadith explanation
what_the_owner_is_assumed_to_know: That the text belongs to an explanation of حديث المسيء في صلاته
why_that_assumption_is_forbidden_or_allo: Forbidden because the owner explicitly says he would not know this from the fragment alone
risk_if_wrong: Identity loss and wrong classification of the text type.

assumption_label: Owner can infer omitted earlier scope correctly
why_that_assumption_is_forbidden_or_allo: Forbidden because guesswork is exactly what the library is supposed to eliminate

what_the_owner_is_assumed_to_know: How to go elsewhere and reconstruct what the fragment depends on
why_that_assumption_is_forbidden_or_allo: Forbidden by the owner’s self-containment standard
risk_if_wrong: The library ceases to be a peace-of-heart study environment.
